security.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
security.description: Protect your account with one-time codes from an authenticator app (Google or Microsoft Authenticator).

setup.title: Set up your authenticator app
setup.instruction: Scan the QR code with Google or Microsoft Authenticator.

recovery.title: Recovery codes
recovery.warning: These codes are shown only once. Store them somewhere safe — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator app.

challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
challenge.instruction: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.

disable.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disable.description: Enter your password to confirm. This removes 2FA and your recovery codes.

regenerate.title: Regenerate recovery codes
regenerate.description: Your previous recovery codes will stop working. Enter your password to confirm.

errors.totpInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
errors.totpReuse: This code was already used. Wait for the next one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
